name: @phylocanvas/phylocanvas.gl
when_to_use: 进化生物学/基因组流行病学/分类学:枝长(branch-length)树、带元数据环的放射 phylogram、大叶片数。喂 Newick/Nexus 字符串 + size{width,height}(px),type 选布局(TreeTypes)。当需要 phylogram 枝长、放射/环形布局或 >1000 叶的 GPU 速度时,替代目录里的 d3-hierarchy(通用 tidy tree)。依赖 WebGL;deck.gl peer 由 jsDelivr +esm 自动链式解析,无需手动引。
why_valuable: WebGL 上的系统发育树:矩形、环形、放射、层级 dendrogram,带真实枝长、可折叠 clade、tip 元数据块,可扩展到数万叶。放射/环形 phylogram 布局(枝角数学、不重叠曲线枝、元数据环)超出 AI 可靠手写范围,而它直接解析 Newick/Nexus。

data_in.note: new PhylocanvasGL(element, props)。source 是 Newick(或 Nexus)字符串;size{width,height} 像素必填(WebGL canvas);type 用 TreeTypes 常量。deck.gl/luma.gl 由 +esm 从 jsDelivr 自动链式解析。

schema.size: { width: number, height: number } —— 必填像素尺寸
schema.type?: TreeTypes 值:Rectangular('rc') | Circular('cr') | Radial('rd') | Hierarchical('hr') | Diagonal('dg') —— 默认 Rectangular

spec.note: size.{width,height} 必须是像素数值(WebGL canvas 尺寸);容器同样给 px。禁 vh。

example._why: source 是 Newick 字符串且 size 必填,minimal 钉死格式与像素尺寸。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;节点/叶点击、hover 与折叠由消费 AI 接 PhylocanvasGL 原生回调(如 onNodeClick / props.on-* handlers)处理。

carriers.widget: conditional:deck.gl WebGL canvas 落宿主 shadow 内的 div;事件在自身 canvas,不逃逸;需 WebGL 上下文
carriers.codex: supported:sandbox iframe 需支持 WebGL;deck.gl/luma.gl 由 jsDelivr +esm 链式加载

isolation.evidence: +esm exports PhylocanvasGL (class) + TreeTypes + Shapes + Angles + Newick + Utils + Defaults + plugins + default. Package ships NO .d.ts (jsDelivr flat list has zero *.d.ts); API from +esm exports + phylocanvas.gl docs: new PhylocanvasGL(element, props, plugins?) with props={source(Newick/Nexus string), size:{width,height} px required, type(TreeTypes value), showLabels?, showLeafLabels?, interactive?, nodeSize?, fontSize?}. TreeTypes values verified from bundle: {Circular:'cr', Diagonal:'dg', Hierarchical:'hr', Radial:'rd', Rectangular:'rc'}. +esm chains @deck.gl/layers, @deck.gl/core, @luma.gl/core, @luma.gl/constants from /npm/.../+esm — deck.gl peer (peerDependencies deck.gl ^8.8.12) auto-resolved by jsDelivr; WebGL required. globalDomMutation=no: the single document.body reference is the constructor's `arguments[0]!==void 0?arguments[0]:document.body` element-arg default (untouched when an element is passed). globalStyleInjection=no. globalEvents=no at document level (deck.gl attaches pointer handlers to its own canvas; grep createElement("canvas") x2). shadowCompatible=conditional: deck.gl WebGL canvas renders into the provided element, including a shadow div. confidence medium: no shipped types (API inferred from exports+docs), and requires a WebGL context.

en.when_to_use: Use it for evolutionary biology, genomic epidemiology, or taxonomy: branch-length trees, radial phylograms with metadata rings, and large leaf counts. Provide a Newick/Nexus string plus size{width,height}(px), and choose a layout with type (TreeTypes). When you need phylogram branch lengths, radial/circular layouts, or GPU speed for >1000 leaves, use it instead of the catalog's d3-hierarchy (general tidy tree). It depends on WebGL; the deck.gl peer is resolved transitively by jsDelivr +esm and needs no manual import.
en.why_valuable: It provides WebGL phylogenetic trees: rectangular, circular, radial, and hierarchical dendrograms with real branch lengths, collapsible clades, tip metadata blocks, and scaling to tens of thousands of leaves. Radial/circular phylogram layout (branch-angle math, non-overlapping curved branches, metadata rings) exceeds what AI can reliably hand-write, while this library parses Newick/Nexus directly.

data_in.note: new PhylocanvasGL(element, props). source is a Newick (or Nexus) string; size{width,height} in pixels is required for the WebGL canvas; type uses a TreeTypes constant. deck.gl/luma.gl dependencies resolve transitively through +esm on jsDelivr.

schema.size: { width: number, height: number } -- Required pixel dimensions
schema.type?: TreeTypes value: Rectangular('rc') | Circular('cr') | Radial('rd') | Hierarchical('hr') | Diagonal('dg') -- Default Rectangular

spec.note: size.{width,height} must be pixel numbers (WebGL canvas dimensions); give the container px dimensions as well. vh is prohibited.
